corrections.note: Printed text omits ἡμῶν after ἔστιν; apparatus discusses this variant separately.
Body has singular verb with πᾶς Ἰσραήλ.
Bracket placement in the printed apparatus is after μ, not after ε.

corrections.current: ημων η δικαι sup ras et in mg Bab
corrections.correct: η δικαι sup ras et in mg Bab
corrections.note: The apparatus omits the initial ημων in this clause.
Printed apparatus has οικτειρμοι with epsilon after τ.
Apparatus reads ακουσαι A, not εισ[ηκουσα] A.
Printed siglum note has imperfect/plural form εκρινον.

notes: Left-margin line numbers 5–15 are present in the body transcription as page line indicators, not treated here as errors since they reflect the scan layout. Running head matches. Apparatus otherwise aligns closely with the page.
